message:
fix(channel): enforce FIFO fairness in mpsc reserve, add fallible try_send, and require &mut self for oneshot recv

mpsc: Reserve now checks queue-head position before granting capacity to
prevent starvation of later waiters. SendPermit gains try_send() that
returns the value on disconnect instead of silently dropping it. Recv
future clears its waker on drop to prevent stale executor state retention.
Waiter cleanup on grant sets waiter_id to None so Drop doesn't redundantly
lock and scan the queue.

oneshot: Receiver::recv takes &mut self to statically prevent concurrent
recv futures on the same channel -- a soundness fix that eliminates a class
of logic errors at compile time.

session: TrackedPermit gains try_send() with proper obligation abort on
send failure. Tests updated for mut rx on tracked oneshot channels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
